prompt_text:
### Demographics: 69-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.7 kg; Height 157.3 cm; BMI 20.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 283mg/dL; 9 months ago 269mg/dL; 6 months ago 252mg/dL; 3 months ago 219mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.7kg; 9 months ago 49.8kg; 6 months ago 46.7kg; 3 months ago 47.8kg; current 50.7kg), Height (12 months ago 157.3cm; 9 months ago 157.3cm; 6 months ago 157.3cm; 3 months ago 157.3cm; current 157.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 17U/L), AST (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 84mg/g; 9 months ago 94mg/g; 6 months ago 101mg/g; 3 months ago 78mg/g; current 54mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 69mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 155mg/dL; 9 months ago 137mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 137mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.64 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
